sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁלף

Transliteration: shâlaph

Phonetic: saw-laf'

BDB Definition:

  1. to draw out or off, take off
    1. (Qal)
      1. to draw out
      2. to draw off
      3. to shoot up, draw out (of blade of grass on roof)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2402

Part(s) of speech: Verb
